title: Juarez
writer: John Huston, Æneas MacKenzie, Wolfgang Reinhardt
actors: Paul Muni, Bette Davis, Brian Aherne
plot: Louis Napoleon III (Claude Rains) takes advantage of the American Civil War to circumvent the Monroe Doctrine and expand his power by helping Emperor Maximilian von Habsburg (Brian Aherne) to add Mexico to his empire.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
